cards.back: A subset of machine learning that involves the use of artificial neural networks to analyze and interpret data.
A type of machine learning where an agent learns to take actions in an environment to maximize a reward.
Computer systems modeled after the structure and function of the human brain, used for tasks such as classification, regression, and feature learning.
A mathematical function that introduces non-linearity into a model, typically used in the output layer of a neural network to introduce a non-linear transformation.
The process by which the output of a neuron is calculated based on the weighted sum of its inputs and the activation function applied to the sum.
